body:
This PR adds documentation for the Cloudy example and fills a part of the documentation needs identified in #15.

- [x] Make Cloudy use the current master of Cloudy rather than the super-old V0.1.0
- [x] Make `Cloudy_example_eki.jl` consistent with terminology listed in the glossary
- [x] Make `Cloudy_example_ukp.jl` consistent with terminology listed in the glossary
- [x] Add documentation for Cloudy example
- [x] Review and finalize docs
title: [WIP] Add documentation for Cloudy example
